opponent_team: Kakegawa High — Intra-School Trial Match (Arakawa XI)
narrative_context: Toshihiko Tanaka and the surviving members of the Inspired team (Hiramatsu, Kubo, Sawada) attempt to honor their late coach Gotoh by forming a real team at Kakegawa High. Their first challenge is an internal scrimmage against the school's skeptical regular club members led by Arakawa.

scripted_events.description: Yoshiharu Kubo activates his signature solo dribble sequence. Forces a DRIBBLE vs TACKLE encounter against Arakawa's fullback. Win condition unlocks 'Kubo's Dash' passive for the stage.
scripted_events.outcome_win: Kubo reaches penalty area; grants +10 SHOOT stat bonus to next shooter this stage.

scripted_events.description: Cutscene: Toshihiko recalls Coach Gotoh's words. Triggers a locked SHOOT encounter; player must initiate 'Phantom Left' for the first time (tutorial prompt). Move is partially formed — damage is halved this stage.
scripted_events.outcome_win: Goal scored; Phantom Left officially registered in character movelist.
scripted_events.outcome_lose: Shot blocked; Phantom Left still registered but stage ends in 0-0 draw (still progression).

narrative_context: Kakegawa's first official regional match. The team is untested and has no reputation. Shizuoka Higashi fields a technically superior side relying on structured combination play.

scripted_events.description: Goalkeeper Sawada faces a powerful shot. Forced BLOCK encounter with a -15 BLOCK penalty (reflecting his rawness). Cutscene plays regardless of outcome — emphasizes the team's vulnerability.
scripted_events.outcome_win: Save triggers teammate morale boost: +5 GUTS to all Kakegawa players for 3 turns.
scripted_events.outcome_lose: Opponent goes 1-0 up; triggers Hiramatsu's rally speech (passive +8 DRIBBLE to Toshihiko).

scripted_events.description: Scripted ONE-TWO pass between Kubo and Toshihiko. Unlocks the 'Miracle Combo' mechanic — a chained Pass→Shoot sequence that costs 20 GUTS from each participant but adds a +25 SHOOT bonus to the finishing shot.
scripted_events.outcome_win: Goal + Miracle Combo mechanic permanently enabled.
scripted_events.outcome_lose: Pass-Cut by defender; Miracle Combo still unlocked but no goal.

narrative_context: A dirty, physical side. The match tests Kakegawa's resilience as their opponents foul aggressively. Hiramatsu's leadership as field captain becomes critical.

scripted_events.description: A scripted hard foul forces a TACKLE encounter on Hiramatsu. If Hiramatsu loses, he enters 'Injured' state: all stats -20%, GUTS drain doubles. Reflects the anime's physical punishment arc.
scripted_events.outcome_lose: Injured state active. Cutscene: Toshihiko vows to carry the team.

scripted_events.description: Kubo's legendary solo run from his own half. Triggers a chain of 4 consecutive DRIBBLE encounters with escalating defender stats. Each successful dribble refills 10 GUTS for all allies.
scripted_events.outcome_win_all_4: Kubo shoots; grants +30 SHOOT. Cinematic cutscene plays.
scripted_events.outcome_lose_any: Ball lost at the point of failure; chain resets.

narrative_context: A semi-professional style club team backed by resources. Features their ace striker with a powerful header game, directly challenging Sawada's goalkeeping ceiling.

scripted_events.description: Forced aerial duel. Sawada must use 'Punch Clear' (costs 15 GUTS). BLOCK vs SHOOT stat check. Highlights his growth arc.
scripted_events.outcome_lose: Header goal; triggers Toshihiko anger state (+15 SHOOT for 2 turns, -10 PASS).

scripted_events.description: Toshihiko's Phantom Left fully manifests for the first time. Cutscene: ball curves impossibly. SHOOT encounter uses Phantom Left's full stats (no longer halved). Goalkeeper BLOCK check at -20 penalty.
scripted_events.outcome_win: Winning goal; Phantom Left upgraded to Tier 2 in character stats.
scripted_events.outcome_lose: Saved; match goes to overtime (bonus stage, turns +5).

narrative_context: A nationally ranked school with individual superstars. This is Kakegawa's true coming-out match. The gap in raw talent is visible — only teamwork bridges it.

scripted_events.description: Yokohama's ace (Mizoguchi Ryuji analogue) scores within the first 2 turns via a scripted event player cannot prevent. Forces Kakegawa into deficit immediately.
scripted_events.outcome: Kakegawa 0-1. Morale system activates: all stats -5% until Kakegawa equalizes.

scripted_events.description: All three core players (Toshihiko, Kubo, Hiramatsu) are on field simultaneously after equalization. 'Miracle Team' synergy activates: any Miracle Combo costs -5 GUTS (stacks with existing discount).
scripted_events.outcome_win_match: Advance to final. Extended cutscene: Coach Gotoh's memory.
scripted_events.outcome_lose_match: Story branch: loss is canonical to certain anime arcs — game continues to Stage 6 via 'defeat route'.

opponent_team: Shizuoka Prefectural Select XI (Prefectural Final / Kanto Qualifier)
narrative_context: The cumulative showdown. The Select team is assembled from the best players Kakegawa has already defeated, coached by someone who has studied all of Kakegawa's patterns.

scripted_events.description: Halftime cutscene: Hiramatsu's locker-room speech. All Kakegawa GUTS bars reset to 60% of max (not full, reflecting exhaustion). Stat bonuses: +10 to all base stats for second half only.
scripted_events.outcome: Permanent for second half of this stage.

scripted_events.description: Even at near-zero GUTS, Toshihiko can activate 'Phantom Left — Limit Break': costs ALL remaining GUTS (minimum 1). SHOOT stat temporarily becomes 255 (max). One-time use. Cutscene mandatory.
scripted_events.outcome_win: Goal. Match win if score equalized or ahead.
scripted_events.outcome_lose: Saved only if opponent GK has BLOCK ≥ 240 (only final boss GK qualifies).

scripted_events.description: Extended ending cutscene: the team qualifies for the Kanto tournament. Coach Gotoh's photo shown. Credits sequence for Chapter 1 arc. New game chapter unlocked.

narrative_context: First exposure to Kanto-level talent. Physically bigger players with advanced combination play. Kakegawa's technical skill must compensate for the size disadvantage.

scripted_events.description: Cutscene showing Kubo knocked down hard. His SPEED drops by 15 for 2 turns. Signals to player that brute-force dribbling must yield to pass-based play.
scripted_events.outcome: Kubo stat debuff applied; resolves after 2 turns naturally.

narrative_context: A counter-attacking side that sits deep and strikes fast. Their ace forward has a Submarine Shot variant that reduces GK BLOCK by 30 on execution.

scripted_events.description: Scripted Submarine Shot from opponent's ace. BLOCK check at -30 for Sawada. Even if saved, cutscene acknowledges the danger.
scripted_events.outcome_win: Save. Sawada gains 'Read Submarine' passive: -15 penalty removed for rest of match.
scripted_events.outcome_lose: Goal conceded. Match difficulty increases (opponent AI gets +10 to all TACKLE checks).

opponent_team: Tokyo Musashi (Kanto Semifinal — Rival School Arc)
narrative_context: Musashi's ace, Kazuhiro Okita, is Toshihiko's personal rival from middle school. The match carries enormous emotional weight and unlocks deeper Phantom Left variants.

scripted_events.description: Mandatory one-on-one DRIBBLE vs TACKLE encounter between Toshihiko and Okita. Cutscene regardless of outcome. If Toshihiko wins: gains 'Rivalry Boost' (+20 SHOOT, +10 DRIBBLE) for 5 turns.
scripted_events.outcome_lose: Toshihiko falls behind; Okita taunts. Triggers 'Desperation Mode' — Phantom Left cost reduced by 10 GUTS for rest of match.

scripted_events.description: Okita activates his signature 'Spiral Drive' shot. Sawada BLOCK check at -25. Cutscene mandatory.
scripted_events.outcome_win: Saved. Sawada permanently unlocks 'Anti-Spiral' passive (+15 BLOCK vs spin shots).
scripted_events.outcome_lose: Concede. Toshihiko must score twice in remaining turns.

narrative_context: The definitive Kanto power: a balanced, deep squad with no obvious weakness. Every player is elite. The match requires the full tactical depth of everything learned.

scripted_events.description: Game checks if all 11 Kakegawa players have been used at least once across Stages 7-9. If yes: 'Full Miracle Team' passive active — Miracle Combo chain can extend to 3 players (Pass→Pass→Shoot) at 15 GUTS cost each.

If score is tied at the last turn, a forced Toshihiko SHOOT encounter triggers. Phantom Left — Limit Break is available even if GUTS > 20 (exception rule for finale). Extended cinematic regardless of outcome.
scripted_events.outcome_win: Kanto Champions. Full ending cutscene. Credits roll for Chapter 2.
scripted_events.outcome_lose: Overtime: 3 additional turns, then Penalty Shootout mini-game.
